AuditEvent.target: Rule: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger

entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>sql:SELECT name,identity_name,application_name FROM identityiq.spt_provisioning_transaction where name > 0000007013 and attributes LIKE '%op="Add"%' and status='Success' and source='IdentityRefresh' and operation='Create' and application_name in('Active Directory') order by name DESC</String>
